Agibuild.Fulora
Table of Contents

Interface IWebView

Namespace
Agibuild.Fulora
Assembly
Agibuild.Fulora.Core.dll

Public WebView contract surface for navigation, scripting, events, and feature adapters.

public interface IWebView : IDisposable
Inherited Members
IDisposable.Dispose()

Properties

Bridge

Gets the type-safe bridge service for exposing C# services to JS (JsExportAttribute) and importing JS services into C# (JsImportAttribute).

Accessing this property auto-enables the WebMessage bridge if it is not already enabled. 

IBridgeService Bridge { get; }

Property Value

IBridgeService

BridgeTracer

Sets the bridge tracer for observability. Must be set before the first access to Bridge; changes after the bridge is created are silently ignored.

IBridgeTracer? BridgeTracer { get; set; }

Property Value

IBridgeTracer

CanGoBack

Gets whether the WebView can navigate back in history.

bool CanGoBack { get; }

Property Value

bool

CanGoForward

Gets whether the WebView can navigate forward in history.

bool CanGoForward { get; }

Property Value

bool

ChannelId

Gets the channel id used to isolate WebMessage traffic.

Guid ChannelId { get; }

Property Value

Guid

IsLoading

Gets whether a navigation is currently in progress.

bool IsLoading { get; }

Property Value

bool

Rpc

Gets the RPC service for bidirectional JS ↔ C# method calls. Returns null until the WebMessage bridge is enabled.

IWebViewRpcService? Rpc { get; }

Property Value

IWebViewRpcService

Source

Gets or sets the current navigation URI.

Uri Source { get; set; }

Property Value

Uri

Methods

AddPreloadScriptAsync(string)

Adds a JavaScript snippet that runs before every page load.

Task<string> AddPreloadScriptAsync(string javaScript)

Parameters

javaScript string

Returns

Task<string>

An opaque script ID for later removal.

Exceptions

NotSupportedException

The adapter does not implement preload scripts.

CaptureScreenshotAsync()

Captures a screenshot of the current viewport as a PNG byte array. Throws NotSupportedException if the adapter does not support screenshots.

Task<byte[]> CaptureScreenshotAsync()

Returns

Task<byte[]>

CloseDevToolsAsync()

Closes the browser developer tools. No-op if the platform adapter does not support runtime DevTools toggling.

Task CloseDevToolsAsync()

Returns

Task

FindInPageAsync(string, FindInPageOptions?)

Searches the current page for text.

Task<FindInPageResult> FindInPageAsync(string text, FindInPageOptions? options = null)

Parameters

text string
options FindInPageOptions

Returns

Task<FindInPageResult>

Exceptions

NotSupportedException

The adapter does not implement find-in-page.

GetZoomFactorAsync()

Gets or sets the zoom factor. 1.0 = 100%. Returns 1.0 if zoom is not supported.

Task<double> GetZoomFactorAsync()

Returns

Task<double>

GoBackAsync()

Attempts to navigate back.

Task<bool> GoBackAsync()

Returns

Task<bool>

GoForwardAsync()

Attempts to navigate forward.

Task<bool> GoForwardAsync()

Returns

Task<bool>

InvokeScriptAsync(string)

Executes JavaScript in the context of the current document.

Task<string?> InvokeScriptAsync(string script)

Parameters

script string

The JavaScript source.

Returns

Task<string>

IsDevToolsOpenAsync()

Returns whether developer tools are currently open. Always returns false if the platform adapter does not support this check.

Task<bool> IsDevToolsOpenAsync()

Returns

Task<bool>

NavigateAsync(Uri)

Navigates to the specified URI.

Task NavigateAsync(Uri uri)

Parameters

uri Uri

The target URI.

Returns

Task

NavigateToStringAsync(string)

Navigates to a string of HTML.

Task NavigateToStringAsync(string html)

Parameters

html string

The HTML content.

Returns

Task

NavigateToStringAsync(string, Uri?)

Navigates to a string of HTML with an optional base URL.

Task NavigateToStringAsync(string html, Uri? baseUrl)

Parameters

html string

The HTML content.

baseUrl Uri

Optional base URI for relative URL resolution.

Returns

Task

OpenDevToolsAsync()

Opens the browser developer tools (inspector) at runtime. No-op if the platform adapter does not support runtime DevTools toggling.

Task OpenDevToolsAsync()

Returns

Task

PrintToPdfAsync(PdfPrintOptions?)

Prints the current page to a PDF byte array. Throws NotSupportedException if the adapter does not support printing.

Task<byte[]> PrintToPdfAsync(PdfPrintOptions? options = null)

Parameters

options PdfPrintOptions

Returns

Task<byte[]>

RefreshAsync()

Reloads the current page.

Task<bool> RefreshAsync()

Returns

Task<bool>

RemovePreloadScriptAsync(string)

Removes a previously added preload script.

Task RemovePreloadScriptAsync(string scriptId)

Parameters

scriptId string

Returns

Task

Exceptions

NotSupportedException

The adapter does not implement preload scripts.

SetZoomFactorAsync(double)

Sets the zoom factor. 1.0 = 100%.

Task SetZoomFactorAsync(double zoomFactor)

Parameters

zoomFactor double

The zoom factor to set.

Returns

Task

StopAsync()

Stops an active navigation, if any.

Task<bool> StopAsync()

Returns

Task<bool>

StopFindInPageAsync(bool)

Stops an active find session and optionally clears highlights.

Task StopFindInPageAsync(bool clearHighlights = true)

Parameters

clearHighlights bool

Returns

Task

Exceptions

NotSupportedException

The adapter does not implement find-in-page.

TryGetCommandManager()

Gets the command manager if supported by the adapter; otherwise null.

ICommandManager? TryGetCommandManager()

Returns

ICommandManager

TryGetCookieManager()

Gets the cookie manager if supported by the adapter; otherwise null.

ICookieManager? TryGetCookieManager()

Returns

ICookieManager

TryGetWebViewHandleAsync()

Gets the typed native WebView handle if supported; otherwise null.

Task<INativeHandle?> TryGetWebViewHandleAsync()

Returns

Task<INativeHandle>

Events

AdapterCreated

Raised after the native adapter is attached and ready. The event args carry the typed platform handle.

event EventHandler<AdapterCreatedEventArgs>? AdapterCreated

Event Type

EventHandler<AdapterCreatedEventArgs>

AdapterDestroyed

Raised before the native adapter is detached/destroyed. After this event, TryGetWebViewHandle() returns null.

event EventHandler? AdapterDestroyed

Event Type

EventHandler

ContextMenuRequested

Raised when the user triggers a context menu (right-click, long-press).

event EventHandler<ContextMenuRequestedEventArgs>? ContextMenuRequested

Event Type

EventHandler<ContextMenuRequestedEventArgs>

DownloadRequested

Raised when a file download is initiated. The handler can set DownloadPath or Cancel.

event EventHandler<DownloadRequestedEventArgs>? DownloadRequested

Event Type

EventHandler<DownloadRequestedEventArgs>

EnvironmentRequested

Raised when the environment is requested (placeholder).

event EventHandler<EnvironmentRequestedEventArgs>? EnvironmentRequested

Event Type

EventHandler<EnvironmentRequestedEventArgs>

NavigationCompleted

Raised when a navigation completes (success, failure, canceled, superseded).

event EventHandler<NavigationCompletedEventArgs>? NavigationCompleted

Event Type

EventHandler<NavigationCompletedEventArgs>

NavigationStarted

Raised when a navigation starts. Handlers may cancel the navigation.

event EventHandler<NavigationStartingEventArgs>? NavigationStarted

Event Type

EventHandler<NavigationStartingEventArgs>

NewWindowRequested

Raised when content requests opening a new window.

event EventHandler<NewWindowRequestedEventArgs>? NewWindowRequested

Event Type

EventHandler<NewWindowRequestedEventArgs>

PermissionRequested

Raised when web content requests a permission (camera, mic, geolocation, etc.).

event EventHandler<PermissionRequestedEventArgs>? PermissionRequested

Event Type

EventHandler<PermissionRequestedEventArgs>

WebMessageReceived

Raised when a WebMessage is received from the page.

event EventHandler<WebMessageReceivedEventArgs>? WebMessageReceived

Event Type

EventHandler<WebMessageReceivedEventArgs>

WebResourceRequested

Raised when a custom-scheme request is intercepted.

event EventHandler<WebResourceRequestedEventArgs>? WebResourceRequested

Event Type

EventHandler<WebResourceRequestedEventArgs>
Edit this page
Agibuild.Fulora — Cross-platform Hybrid App Framework
